title: CobbleGEXX
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e71b10be8143875d766514e13301f28b6021559_0.webp)

# Welcome to a new modpack made by the Team Colossea.
This modpack was built on top of the Cobblemon Official modpack and some inspiration was taken from the modpack Cobblemon Star Acaddemy.

This modpack is made for a private server, but you can still play in singleplayer.

In this Cobblemon modpack you can discover new cobblemons and fakemons.

## Why GEXX ?
GEXX came from GEII, "Génie Electrique et Informatique Industrielle", where me and my friends do our studies.

## What is different with the Official Cobblemon modpack ?
CobbleGEXX adds custom biomes with Biomes we've goen, custom pokemons with Allthemons and missinglegends, some fakemons with Gravelmon and Alatia's Fakemon pack, and some other addons like Mega Showdown.

## What inspirations did you took from Cobblemon Star Academy ?
Some mods from Star Academy are in this modpack. Some of theirs custom datapacks are also here, those are only for custom loot tables, and they have some edits to work with fakemons and for 1.21.1.

## Can I join the GEXX server ?
If you are a student in IUT1 Grenoble, or you are a friend of someone working here, otherwise no.
